name: admission-tracker
description: Root meta-package: backend and SPA live in caretrack-backend/ and admissions-app/.

scripts.postinstall: npm install --prefix caretrack-backend --no-audit --no-fund && npm install --prefix admissions-app --no-audit --no-fund
scripts.install:all: npm install --prefix caretrack-backend --no-audit --no-fund && npm install --prefix admissions-app --no-audit --no-fund
scripts.ci:all: npm ci --prefix caretrack-backend --no-audit --no-fund && npm ci --prefix admissions-app --no-audit --no-fund
scripts.test: npm test --prefix caretrack-backend && npm test --prefix admissions-app
